---
title: "WebAssembly Lotka-Volterra Simulator"
format: html
filters:
  - shinylive
shinylive:
  shinylive-repo: "https://posit-dev.github.io/shinylive/r/repo/"  
embed-resources: false  
---

This simulation runs entirely inside your web browser using WebAssembly via webR. No background R server is required.

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 800
library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)

# 1. Lokale Übersetzungsdatenbank für den Standalone-Betrieb
translation_data <- '{
  "languages": ["en", "de"],
  "translation": [
    {"en": "Initial Values", "de": "Anfangswerte"},
    {"en": "Parameters", "de": "Parameter"},
    {"en": "Time", "de": "Zeit"},
    {"en": "Abundance", "de": "Abundanz"},
    {"en": "Prey", "de": "Beute"},
    {"en": "Predator", "de": "Räuber"},
    {"en": "Population", "de": "Population"},
    {"en": "B0: Prey", "de": "B0: Beute"},
    {"en": "R0: Predator", "de": "R0: Räuber"},
    {"en": "a: Reproduction rate prey", "de": "a: Vermehrungsrate Beute"},
    {"en": "b: Loss prey by grazing", "de": "b: Verlust Beute durch Fraß"},
    {"en": "c: Efficiency predator", "de": "c: Effizienz Räuber"},
    {"en": "d: Mortality rate predator", "de": "d: Sterberate Räuber"},
    {"en": "Sample values", "de": "Werte abtasten"},
    {"en": "Download", "de": "Download"},
    {"en": "Abundance of prey at time t=0", "de": "Abundanz der Beute zum Zeitpunkt t=0"},
    {"en": "Abundance of predator at time t=0", "de": "Abundanz des Räubers zum Zeitpunkt t=0"},
    {"en": "Reproduction rate of phytoplankton (prey population)", "de": "Vermehrungsrate des Phytoplanktons (Beutepopulation)"},
    {"en": "Grazing loss of phytoplankton (prey) due to consumption by daphnia (predator)", "de": "Fraßverlust des Phytoplanktons (Beute) durch Fraß der Daphnien (Räuber)"},
    {"en": "Growth efficiency of daphnia (predator) via food intake", "de": "Zuwachseffizienz der Daphnien (Räuber) durch Nahrungsaufnahme"},
    {"en": "Mortality rate of daphnia (predator)", "de": "Sterberate der Daphnien (Räuber)"}
  ]
}'

t_dict <- jsonlite::fromJSON(translation_data)$translation
current_lang <- "de" # "de" oder "en" zur Sprachsteuerung

translate <- function(text) {
  match <- t_dict[t_dict$en == text, current_lang]
  if (length(match) == 0 || is.na(match) || match == "") return(text)
  return(match)
}

# 2. Reiner R-Runge-Kutta-Solver (kein deSolve benötigt!)
rk4_pure <- function(y, times, func, parms) {
  out <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(times), ncol = length(y) + 1)
  out[1, ] <- c(times[1], y)
  colnames(out) <- c("time", names(y))
  current_y <- y
  for (i in 1:(length(times) - 1)) {
    t_curr <- times[i]
    t_next <- times[i + 1]
    h <- t_next - t_curr
    k1 <- unlist(func(t_curr,          current_y,          parms))
    k2 <- unlist(func(t_curr + h / 2,  current_y + h * k1 / 2, parms))
    k3 <- unlist(func(t_curr + h / 2,  current_y + h * k2 / 2, parms))
    k4 <- unlist(func(t_next,          current_y + h * k3,     parms))
    current_y <- current_y + (h / 6) * (k1 + 2 * k2 + 2 * k3 + k4)
    out[i + 1, ] <- c(t_next, current_y)
  }
  return(as.data.frame(out))
}

# Modellgleichungen
lv <- function (t, x, parms) {
  with(as.list(c(x, parms)),{
    dB <- a * B - b * R * B
    dR <- c * R * B - d * R
    list(c(dB, dR))
  })
}

# 3. Shiny Benutzeroberfläche (UI)
ui <- fluidPage(
  theme = bslib::bs_theme(version = 5, bootswatch = "flatly"),
  titlePanel(div("Lotka-Volterra webR (Shinylive)", style = "color: #2c3e50; font-weight: bold;")),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      h4(translate("Initial Values"), style = "border-bottom: 2px solid #69af22; padding-bottom: 5px;"),
      fluidRow(
        column(6, numericInput("lv_B0", label = translate("B0: Prey"), value = 1.0, min = 0, max = 2, step = 0.1)),
        column(6, numericInput("lv_R0", label = translate("R0: Predator"), value = 0.5, min = 0, max = 2, step = 0.1))
      ),
      br(),
      h4(translate("Parameters"), style = "border-bottom: 2px solid #009de0; padding-bottom: 5px;"),
      sliderInput("lv_a", label = translate("a: Reproduction rate prey"), value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02),
      sliderInput("lv_b", label = translate("b: Loss prey by grazing"), value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02),
      sliderInput("lv_c", label = translate("c: Efficiency predator"), value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02),
      sliderInput("lv_d", label = translate("d: Mortality rate predator"), value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02),
      br(),
      checkboxInput("lv_grid", translate("Sample values"), value = FALSE),
      downloadButton("downloadData", translate("Download"), class = "btn-dark w-100")
    ),
    mainPanel(
      plotlyOutput("lotkavolterra", height = "600px")
    )
  )
)

# 4. Shiny Server-Logik
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  times <- seq(0, 200, by = 0.2)
  
  simulate <- reactive({
    parms <- c(a = input$lv_a, b = input$lv_b, c = input$lv_c, d = input$lv_d)
    y0    <- c(B = input$lv_B0, R = input$lv_R0)
    rk4_pure(y0, times, lv, parms)
  })
  
  output$lotkavolterra <- renderPlotly({
    res <- simulate()
    
    label_time      <- translate("Time")
    label_abundance <- translate("Abundance")
    label_prey      <- translate("Prey")
    label_predator  <- translate("Predator")
    label_pop       <- translate("Population")
    
    lv_df <- res |>
      rename(!!sym(label_prey) := B, !!sym(label_predator) := R) |>
      pivot_longer(cols = c(!!sym(label_prey), !!sym(label_predator)), 
                   names_to = label_pop, values_to = label_abundance) |>
      rename(!!sym(label_time) := time)
      
    if (input$lv_grid == FALSE) {
      gg <- lv_df |>
        ggplot(aes(!!sym(label_time), !!sym(label_abundance), color = !!sym(label_pop))) + 
        geom_line(linewidth = 1) + 
        scale_color_manual(values = c("#69af22", "#009de0"))
    } else {
      prey_peaks <- lv_df |>
        dplyr::filter(!!sym(label_pop) == label_prey) |>
        dplyr::slice(which(diff(sign(diff(!!sym(label_abundance)))) == -2))
      
      pred_peaks <- lv_df |>
        dplyr::filter(!!sym(label_pop) == label_predator) |>
        dplyr::slice(which(diff(sign(diff(!!sym(label_abundance)))) == -2))
      
      gg <- lv_df |>
        ggplot(aes(!!sym(label_time), !!sym(label_abundance), color = !!sym(label_pop))) + 
        geom_line(linewidth = 1) + 
        scale_color_manual(values = c("#69af22", "#009de0"))
        
      lwd <- 0.3
      if (nrow(pred_peaks) > 0) {
        gg <- gg + geom_vline(aes(xintercept = !!sym(label_time)), colour = "#009de0", linetype = "dotted", linewidth = lwd, data = pred_peaks)
      }
      if (nrow(prey_peaks) > 0) {
        gg <- gg + geom_vline(aes(xintercept = !!sym(label_time)), colour = "#69af22", linetype = "dotted", linewidth = lwd, data = prey_peaks)
      }
      
      gg <- gg + 
        geom_hline(aes(yintercept = input$lv_a/input$lv_b), colour = "#009de0", linewidth = lwd, linetype = "dotted") +
        geom_hline(aes(yintercept = input$lv_d/input$lv_c), colour = "#69af22", linewidth = lwd, linetype = "dotted")
    }
    
    gg <- gg + 
      labs(x = label_time, y = label_abundance, color = NULL) +
      theme_minimal() + 
      theme(legend.position = "bottom")
      
    ggplotly(gg)
  })
  
  output$downloadData <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() { paste("simulation-", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d-%H%M%S"), ".csv", sep = "") },
    content = function(file) {
      res <- simulate()
      lv_df <- res |> rename(Prey = B, Predator = R, Time = time)
      decimal_sep <- if(current_lang == "en") "." else ","
      column_sep  <- if(current_lang == "en") "," else ";"
      write.table(lv_df, file, row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE, dec = decimal_sep, sep = column_sep)
    }
  )
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```
